summary: Completed comprehensive testing of HevaPOS Subscription Management and Mobile Cart features. All 11 backend API tests PASSED. All 5 frontend UI tests PASSED. Features tested: Subscriptions API (list, status change, my subscription, check-trials), Notifications API, Mobile Cart Sheet, Desktop Cart Sidebar, No Online Badge, Admin Dashboard Subscription Banner.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo data (rest_demo_1 Pizza Palace)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All subscription and notification features verified working. Subscription status was changed to 'active' and reverted back to 'trial' during testing. Pizza Palace (rest_demo_1) has 3 days trial left. Mobile cart sheet opens via floating button at bottom-right (data-testid='mobile-cart-button'). Desktop cart sidebar visible at x=1540 with 380px width. OfflineIndicator only shows when offline/syncing - no 'Online' badge blocking buttons. Admin dashboard shows trial banner with days-left info.

backend_tests.test_get_subscriptions_list: PASSED - Found Pizza Palace with trial status and trial_days_left
backend_tests.test_get_my_subscription: PASSED - Returns subscription info for restaurant_admin

test_1_subscriptions_page_desktop.details: Subscriptions heading visible, Check Trial Expirations button present, 1 subscription card (Pizza Palace) with Trial badge, Manage Subscription button visible, 3 Pending Notifications banner shown

test_2_mobile_cart_sheet_375x812.details: Mobile cart button visible at bottom-right (x=258, y=740). Sheet opens with Cart header, Table selector (Takeaway), Discount/Notes buttons, Total, Place Order button

test_3_desktop_cart_sidebar_1920x800.details: Cart sidebar visible on right side (x=1540, width=380). ShoppingCart icon, Table selector, Place Order button all visible. Mobile cart button correctly hidden on desktop

test_4_no_online_badge_mobile.details: No 'Online' badge found when online. OfflineIndicator not in DOM when online. Logout and Pending orders buttons visible and not blocked

test_5_admin_dashboard_subscription_bann.details: Subscription banner visible: 'Trial: 3 days left — Subscribe now to avoid interruption'. Dashboard heading visible
